panels.description: Total number of sessions

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| summarize sessions = dcount(tostring(customDimensions["opencode.run_id"]))

panels.title: Total Sessions

panels.description: Total user prompts sent

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where tostring(customDimensions["service"]) == "session.prompt"
| where tostring(customDimensions["step"]) == "0"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: User Prompts

panels.description: Count of ai.streamText spans (LLM stream calls)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize llmCalls = count()

panels.title: LLM Calls

panels.description: Sum of ai.usage.totalTokens across all LLM calls

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize totalTokens = sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.totalTokens"]))

panels.title: Total Tokens

panels.description: Cache-read tokens as % of input tokens

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize pct = 100.0 * sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokenDetails.cacheReadTokens"])) / todouble(sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokens"])))

panels.title: Cache Read %

panels.description: Total exceptions in window

azureLogAnalytics.query:
exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| summarize exceptions = count()

panels.title: Exceptions

panels.description: Total Tool.execute span count

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "Tool.execute"
| summarize toolCalls = count()

panels.title: Tool Executions

panels.description: % of Tool.execute spans with otel.status_code = STATUS_CODE_ERROR

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "Tool.execute"
| summarize pct = 100.0 * countif(tostring(customDimensions["otel.status_code"]) == "STATUS_CODE_ERROR") / todouble(count())

panels.title: Tool Failure %

panels.description: Total ai.streamText tokens divided by SessionPrompt.prompt count
panels.title: Avg Tokens / Prompt

panels.description: p95 of SessionPrompt.prompt span duration (end-to-end prompt time including tool calls)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "SessionPrompt.prompt"
| summarize p95s = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000.0

panels.title: Prompt p95 Latency

panels.description: Average ai.usage.outputTokens per LLM call

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize avgOut = avg(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.outputTokens"]))

panels.title: Avg Output Tokens / Call

panels.description: Cache-write tokens as % of input tokens (new content added to prompt cache)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize pct = 100.0 * sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokenDetails.cacheWriteTokens"])) / todouble(sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokens"])))

panels.title: Cache Write %

panels.description: LLM call rate over time, stacked by model

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["ai.model.id"])
| summarize calls = count() by bin(timestamp, $__interval), model
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: LLM Calls by Model

panels.description: Token usage stacked: input / output / cache-read

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize input = sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokens"])), output = sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.outputTokens"])), cacheRead = sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokenDetails.cacheReadTokens"])) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time

panels.description: Tool executions from Tool.execute spans, with failures and p95 latency

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "Tool.execute"
| extend toolName = tostring(customDimensions["tool.name"]),
         status = tostring(customDimensions["otel.status_code"])
| summarize calls = count(),
            failures = countif(status == "STATUS_CODE_ERROR"),
            totalSec = round(sum(duration)/1000.0, 2),
            p95ms = percentile(duration, 95)
  by toolName
| order by totalSec desc

panels.title: Top Tools Called

panels.description: webfetch destinations with failure count and p95 latency

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where type == "Other" and name startswith "http.client"
| extend host = tostring(customDimensions["server.address"]),
         status = toint(customDimensions["http.response.status_code"])
| summarize calls = count(),
            s2xx = countif(status >= 200 and status < 300),
            s4xx = countif(status >= 400 and status < 500),
            s5xx = countif(status >= 500)
  by host
| order by calls desc

panels.title: Top WebFetch Hosts

panels.description: LLM call latency p50/p95 per model

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["ai.model.id"])
| summarize calls = count(), p95ms = percentile(duration, 95) by model
| order by calls desc

panels.title: LLM Latency by Model

panels.description: Top sessions by token usage (last 7d default)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| extend sessionId = tostring(customDimensions["ai.telemetry.metadata.sessionId"]),
         totTok = toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.totalTokens"])
| summarize llmCalls = count(),
            totalTokens = sum(totTok)
  by sessionId
| order by totalTokens desc
| take 10

panels.title: Top Sessions by Tokens

panels.description: Top distinct exception messages (last 7d default)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| extend errType = type, msg = substring(outerMessage, 0, 80)
| summarize calls = count() by errType, msg
| order by calls desc
| take 10

panels.title: Top Exceptions

panels.description: LLM calls and tokens broken down by AI provider

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| extend provider = tostring(customDimensions["ai.model.provider"]),
         totTok = toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.totalTokens"])
| summarize calls = count(),
            totalTokens = sum(totTok)
  by provider
| order by totalTokens desc

panels.title: Provider Split

panels.description: Why each ai.streamText call ended. High tool-calls % means more agent loops per prompt.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["ai.model.id"]),
         finishReason = tostring(customDimensions["ai.response.finishReason"])
| summarize calls = count() by model, finishReason
| order by calls desc

panels.title: LLM Finish Reason

panels.description: End-to-end SessionPrompt.prompt latency (avg & p95) — watch for trend growth as sessions get longer.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "SessionPrompt.prompt"
| summarize avgSec = avg(duration)/1000.0, p95Sec = percentile(duration, 95)/1000.0
  by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Prompt Latency Over Time

panels.description: cacheRead / inputTokens. Trends the Cache Read % stat — watch for drops after prompt edits invalidate the prefix cache.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "opencode"
| where name == "ai.streamText"
| summarize cachePct = 100.0 * sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokenDetails.cacheReadTokens"])) / todouble(sum(toint(customDimensions["ai.usage.inputTokens"])))
  by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio Over Time

title: OpenCode
description: OpenCode usage analytics: tracks sessions, user prompts, LLM calls, token consumption, tool executions, prompt latency, cache hit ratio, exceptions, and per-model/provider breakdowns. Data sourced from Application Insights via OpenTelemetry.
